backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage, role-based access control (guest/user/admin), and field visibility configuration with admin-only management endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Sid Trades app with dark mode class, favicon, meta description, and a root div mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for the trade list (/), trade detail (/trade/:id), and admin (/admin) pages inside a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/DisclaimerBanner: Non-dismissible banner component that displays an educational-purposes-only disclaimer at the top of every page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer showing copyright year, a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters, and a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, Internet Identity login/logout, and conditional Admin link for admin users.
frontend/src/components/PremiumFieldPlac: Small inline badge component displaying a lock icon and 'Premium Only' label to replace restricted field values for non-premium users.
frontend/src/components/TradeBadge.tsx: Reusable badge component that renders color-coded labels for trade result, status, or category values using utility helper functions.
frontend/src/components/TradeForm.tsx: Controlled form component for creating or editing a trade entry with all fields, client-side validation, and submit/cancel actions.
frontend/src/data/demoTrades.ts: Exports a static array of demo Trade objects covering various categories (Equity, Options, Futures, Forex) with sample data for dates, prices, results, and notes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useFieldVisibility.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating field visibility configuration (public vs. premium-only) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Wraps the Zustand trade store in query-style hooks (useListTrades, useGetTrade, useCreateTrade, useUpdateTrade, useDeleteTrade) for a consistent API surface.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for retrieving the caller's role, listing all users with roles, and mutating a user's role via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark finance-themed CSS custom property palette (gold, emerald, charcoal) including scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging, price/date formatting, trade result/status/category badge styling, P&L calculation, and role-based field visibility checks.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page providing UI for managing trades (CRUD), configuring per-field visibility (public vs. premium), and assigning user roles, all backed by ICP actor hooks.
frontend/src/pages/TradeDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single trade's full details in grouped section cards (Trade Info, Pricing, Outcome, Learnings), with role-based field visibility controlling whether premium fields like PnL are shown.
frontend/src/pages/TradeListPage.tsx: Renders a filterable, searchable list of all trades with stats summary, role badge display, and conditional column visibility based on the caller's user role and field visibility config.
frontend/src/store/tradeStore.ts: Zustand store managing in-memory trade CRUD operations, initialized with demo trades and providing create, update, delete, get, and list methods.
frontend/src/types/trade.ts: Defines TypeScript types and interfaces for trade data including enums for category, timeframe, market cap, result, and status, plus the Trade and TradeFormData interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, emerald, chart colors, sidebar), border radius, box shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state at version 11, documenting completed phases, architectural notes, known issues (broken admin visibility toggles, deployment failures), and existing feature inventory for the Sid Trades ICP trading journal app.
